zh.lifeSummary: 當Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth於大約1150年出生在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾時，他的父親Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon40歲，母親Angharad Verch Uchdrud36歲。他於1180年與Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog在英國威爾斯文特凱爾萊昂結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1211年享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth于大约1150年出生在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾时，他的父亲Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon40岁，母亲Angharad Verch Uchdrud36岁。他于1180年与Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog在英国威尔斯文特凱爾萊昂结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1211年享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth was born about 1150, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon, was 40 and his mother, Angharad Verch Uchdrud, was 36. He married Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog in 1180, in Caerleon, Gwent, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. He died in 1211, at the age of 62.

fr.Caerleon, Gwent, Wales: Caerleon, Gwent, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth est né environ 1150, à Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Angharad Verch Uchdrud, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog en 1180, à Caerleon, Gwent, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1211, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth um 1150 in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon 40 und seine Mutter Angharad Verch Uchdrud 36. Er hat 1180 in Caerleon, Gwent, Wales, United Kingdom Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1211 im Alter von 62 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth è nato il circa 1150 nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Angharad Verch Uchdrud, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog nel 1180, nel Caerleon, Gwent, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1211, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerthが約1150年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアで生まれた時，父Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleonは40歳，母Angharad Verch Uchdrudは36歳であった。1180年にイギリスウェールズグウエントケエルレオンでGwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliogと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1211年に62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth(이)가 대략 1150년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad Verch Uchdrud(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1180년 영국 웨일스 그웬트 카이를리에서 Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1211년 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Angharad Verch Uchdrud, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog em 1180, em Caerleon, Gwent, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1211, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth родился около 1150 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Angharad Verch Uchdrud, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog в 1180 г. в местности каирлеон, гвент, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1211 г. в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth nació aproximadamente 1150, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Angharad Verch Uchdrud, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog en 1180, en Caerleon, Gwent, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Murió en 1211, a la edad de 62 años.
